rationale: Hard pass for Block Blast. The hook leans on copyrighted Dragon Ball IP (legal/ASA risk) and a high-energy shonen anime aesthetic with neon cyan/magenta/yellow that clashes with the game's calm royal-blue, beveled-block visual identity — there is zero connection to drag-and-drop line-clear mechanics. Audience also skews young male anime fans rather than the 25-55 casual puzzle demo, and the cluster is a single stale creative (619d, n=1) with no proven scale signal. Do not adapt.
